title: Cell Cycle Arrest and Apoptosis. Resveratrol administered orally induces cell cycle arrest and apoptosis in melanoma cells through a number of different mechanisms. Studies have shown that resveratrol activates p21, which modulates cyclin-cdk machinery and causes G1 cell cycle arrest. Resveratrol also induces apoptosis in melanoma cells via a mechanism that involves the upregulation of the expression of the tumor suppressor p53 and increased degradation of the pro-survival protein Bcl-2. This process involves resveratrol-induced downregulation of P K M 2. P K M 2 phosphorylates Bcl-2 and prevents the degradation of Bcl-2. Overall, the effects of resveratrol cause apoptosis and the release of cytochrome c from the mitochondria.

sentences.text: Resveratrol administered orally induces cell cycle arrest and apoptosis in melanoma cells through a number of different mechanisms.
Studies have shown that resveratrol activates p21, which modulates cyclin-cdk machinery and causes G1 cell cycle arrest.

Resveratrol also induces apoptosis in melanoma cells via a mechanism that involves the upregulation of the expression of the tumor suppressor p53 and increased degradation of the pro-survival protein Bcl-2.
This process involves resveratrol-induced downregulation of P K M 2.
P K M 2 phosphorylates Bcl-2 and prevents the degradation of Bcl-2.
Overall, the effects of resveratrol cause apoptosis and the release of cytochrome c from the mitochondria.
